ValidationRule.description: Prevents CTBR Users from modifying Dealer Ship To Address
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NATT_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Dealer", $Profile.Name = "CTM Full Access Community", ISPICKVAL(NATT_Type__c, "Units Ship To") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not create or modify a Units Ship To address for a Dealer
